subject: fix: move beforeinstallprompt capture to root layout and collapse tone selector
body:
PWA install: The beforeinstallprompt listener was in usePWAInstall.ts
module scope, but that module isn't imported until home.tsx mounts -
by then the event has already fired. Move the capture to _layout.tsx
(the first module to load) using window globals.

Tone selector: The full tone panel appeared on first keystroke, causing
a jarring layout shift that pushed the input down. Replace with a
collapsed toggle bar showing "Add tone" or selected tone pills. Users
tap to expand the full selector only when they want it.

https://claude.ai/code/session_018ZB9XMkqc1vAptBu6iusNY
